leadText: The Wailmer Pail (Japanese: ホエルコじょうろ Hoeruko Watering Can) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III. It is a watering can fashioned after a Wailmer.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Wailmer Pail allows the player to water planted Berries . If watering is done correctly, the resulting Berry trees will have higher amounts of Berries to pick and store. In Pokémon Emerald only, the Wailmer Pail also allows the player to water a fake tree in the Battle Frontier , revealing it to be a wild Sudowoodo that attacks the player.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A tool used for watering Berries and plants. FR LG A nifty watering pail. Use it to promote strong growth in Berries planted in soft soil. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA This is a tool for watering Berries you planted to make them grow more quickly. S V A watering can shaped like a Wailmer. It helps promote the healthy growth of any Berries planted in soil.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method R S E Route 104 (received from the middle sister in the Pretty Petal flower shop ) OR AS Route 104 (received from the owner of the Pretty Petal flower shop )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Wailmer Pail is the only watering can whose design is based on a Pokémon that was also introduced in the same generation as the watering can. A Wailmer Pail can be seen in the player's house in Pokémon Sun and Moon .
